status.description: This is the status of the service.

message.description: this is the additional message to the status.

itemsList.description: This is the set of grocery items that are present in the company and the items result might vary based on filter criterias.

item.description: This is the details of each item.
item.title: Item

itemId.description: This is the unique item no.

itemCategory.description: This is the item Category which can be used in filter criteria to filter out the grocery list and get responses.
itemCategory.title: ItemCategory

itemName.description: this is the item name associated with item id

companyName.description: This is the company name in which the items are available.

companyId.description: This is the unique company id associated with company name.

perishable.description: This is the value that is associated with perishable food products.This indicates whether the food is perishable.

shelfLifeInDays.description: This tells how many days will the food remain fresh. If a product is still in market after the given date, then the item must be discarded or thrown and not for sale.

totalItemCount.description: This describes the total number of items in this particular category.

currentStockCount.description: This describes what is the current count for this item available to sell.

restockAlert.description: This property describes whether the particular item need to be restocked.If the item count goes below a certain minimum value then thhis value is set to true.

fastSelling.description: This property indicates whether the item falls under fast selling.Based on this the restock interval or number of items per order will be increased.

sellerName.description: This si the company from which the product is ordered for selling.

lastRestockedDate.description: This is for stock maintenance purpose. Helps in billing and supply management.

expectedRestockDate.description: This is for stock maintenance purpose. Helps in billing and supply management.Value should be greate thatn last restocked date.

itemPackedDt.description: This captures the item packed date for safety reasons.

itemExpiryDate.description: This captures the item expiry date and items beyond expiry date must be periodically removed. All the persiahble foods should have a sticker indicating the dates.

value.errorMessage: Password provided is invalid.Please provide valid password to continue.

details.reason: Validation error.Fields invalid - totalItemCount - Value must be a positive integer

The requested item could not be found.

schema.description: Error Component standard across all operations.

status.description: This describes the status of the transaction. In the error scenario ddefault value will be 'error'.

errorType.description: This describes the exact error Type. Adds more info on why the transaction failed.

errorMessage.description: This describes the supporting or more descriptive error msg for a particular error type.

details.description: This describes the extra details for finding the root cause.

traceId.description: Unique id for the particular transaction.

reason.description: Additional details that adds to the failure root cause.

itemNo.description: This is the unique identifying number for the whole transaction. This comes in request.This is also optional if the error is related to incoming request parameters, then this will be coming in response.

conflictingField.description: If there are any conflicting fields on that particular transaction and due to which the whole operation failed then this will be coming in response. It is optional field.

schema.title: ErrorResponse

value.errorMessage: The requested item could not be found.
